creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 162100
update to 41.0.2

https://www.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/41.0.2/releasenotes/
Security "high":
https://www.mozilla.org/en-US/security/known-vulnerabilities/firefox/#firefox41.0.2
https://www.mozilla.org/en-US/security/advisories/mfsa2015-115/

Attached patch updates wwww/firefox and www/firefox-i18n to 41.0.2.
Update is straight-forward (bump version and make), "works for me".
